description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy, and restrict jobs to the master branch. In the test stage add a UnitTestLab1 job that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs before_script commands `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `python manage.py makemigrations`, and `python manage.py migrate`, then executes `python manage.py test lab_1`, `coverage run --include='lab_1/*' manage.py test lab_1`, and `coverage report -m`, and runs on_success. In the deploy stage add a Lab1Deploy job that uses the ruby:2.4 image, runs the before_script `gem install dpl`, then runs `dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, sets the environment name to production with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST, and only runs on the master branch.
